timeline.idea: Recomendador de libros infantiles tipo Netflix

shape.audience: Parents of children 6-16 in Spain searching for book recommendations by age and interests
shape.notFor: Children directly, adult readers, textbooks/academic market
shape.aspiration: Become the go-to resource in Spanish for discovering children's and young adult books
shape.differentiator: Visual discovery experience + curated editorial recommendations ('Por que te va a enganchar') + organization by age x genre matching how parents search
shape.businessModel: Amazon Associates (3-7% commission) + Display ads (at scale) + Featured listings for indie authors (future)
shape.mlpScope: Visual catalog by age (5 ranges: 6-8, 8-10, 10-12, 12-14, 14-16) and genre (6: fantasia, aventuras, misterio, amor, ci-fi, autoayuda), 50-75 books with editorial hooks

build.hosting: Vercel free tier, auto-deploy from GitHub (Josedapo/bookata)
build.status: 31 books with Google Books covers, 28+ static pages, warm editorial design with carousels by age, colored genre navigation, blurred cover backdrop on book detail pages
build.next: Complete catalog to 50-75 books, run /forja-seo-validate, then /forja-launch
